description: Fire-and-forget side effect: process an event and also trigger a notification, but only the process result is operation-graph output. Mirrors the format spec's Example 4.

fixtures.name: Fire-and-forget side effect
fixtures.description: in fans out to items.process and notifications.send. Only process has a path to out, so only its result is output. notify is a dead end: it still executes (the runner should observe notifications.send was invoked), but its result is discarded and is not in the expected output.
